Lindsay Weiss, Esq., of COOLEY MANION JONES HAKE KUROWSKI LLP (415-512-4381), appearing for defendant / moving party Temporary Plant Cleaners, Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT TEMPORARY PLANT CLEANERS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No argument was made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Temporary Plant Cleanrs, Inc.'s general demurrer to plaintiffs' complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give plaintiffs an opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical (1999) 21 Cal.4th 71. Although not cited by defendant, Bockrath is the controlling authority. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)
